signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to continue to iedora.
signIn.errorGeneric: Could not sign in. Please check your credentials.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.subtitle: It takes a minute.
signUp.nameHint: Shown to your team; not visible to guests.
signUp.errorGeneric: Could not create your account. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.emailHint: We'll email a reset link to this address.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
resetPassword.done: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.errorInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.

fields.emailHint: The email you signed up with.
fields.signupFailed: Could not create your account. Please try again.
fields.resetLinkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.

Onboarding.title: Tell us about your restaurant
Onboarding.subtitle: We'll use this to set up your menu and public page.
Onboarding.restaurantNameHint: Your restaurant's public name — guests see it on the menu.

menu.title: Now, your menu
menu.subtitle: Start with a sample menu you can edit, or add your dishes yourself.
menu.sampleHint: We add a few dishes you can change anytime.

Dashboard.title: A carta da casa.
Dashboard.subtitle: Each restaurant is a room in your house. Open one to edit menus, theme, and the QR you've already printed.
Dashboard.noRestaurantsHint: Create one to start building menus.

Restaurant.settingsLede: Colours, fonts, logo, languages and slug.
Restaurant.viewPublicLede: See exactly what your guests see.
Restaurant.emptyLede: Take a photo of your printed menu — we'll read it. Or try a sample to see what the editor looks like first.
Restaurant.qrCodeLede: Your menu QR code, print sheets, and any stickers bound to this restaurant.

Identity.title: Identity
Identity.subtitle: Name, copy, and brand assets shown at the top of the menu.
Identity.name: Restaurant name
Identity.nameHint: Shown as the heading at the top of your public menu.
Identity.descriptionPlaceholder: A short tagline shown under the name.
Identity.descriptionHint: Optional — a line of welcome or your specialty.

Slug.title: Public URL
Slug.subtitle: Branded URL for marketing — QR sticker scans keep working either way.
Slug.label: URL
Slug.warning: Changing the URL breaks bookmarks to the old address.

Languages.title: Languages
Languages.subtitle: Pick which languages your menu supports and which is the default.
Languages.switchedSummary: {count, plural, =1 {Promoted 1 translation into the new default.} other {Promoted # translations into the new default.}}
Languages.switchedAttention: {count, plural, =1 {1 row had no translation in the new default — its original text is still showing through. Open that row to retranslate.} other {# rows had no translation in the new default — their original text is still showing through. Open each one to retranslate.}}

Qr.boundStickersExplanation: Pre-printed sticker codes the iedora team has assigned to your restaurant. This view is read-only — to print more, add labels, or rebind, contact us at hello@iedora.com.
Qr.printSectionHint: Choose paper, size and cut marks, then print a sheet.

Billing.title: Billing
Billing.currentPlanSubtitle: Switch any time. Changes apply on the next invoice.

menu_pro.name: Kasa
menu_pro.tagline: Everything in On Us, plus the tools to grow.

menu_agency.name: Agency
menu_agency.tagline: Unlimited restaurants for teams managing many venues.

Billing.changePlanHint: To change your plan, contact the iedora team.

Misc.title: Settings
Misc.subtitle: Your account and preferences
Misc.description: Plan-scoped usage that doesn't fit on Billing yet.

Builder.addSectionHint: Sections group your dishes on the menu — guests see them as headings.
Builder.emptyMenu: Your menu is empty. Add a section to get started.
Builder.emptySection: No dishes in this section yet. Tap "Add dish" below.
Builder.addItemNameHint: The name guests read on the menu.
Builder.addItemPriceHint: Leave blank to show no price (e.g. market price).
Builder.itemNameHint: The name guests read on the menu.
Builder.itemPriceHint: Leave blank to show no price.
Builder.itemDescriptionHint: One line works best — ingredients or a tasting note.
Builder.itemVariantsHint: Anything that prices the same dish differently — ½ dose, alcohol-free, large, take-away…
Builder.partTranslationsHint: for each language other than the default
Builder.itemVariantTranslationsHint: Leave blank to fall back to the source label.
Builder.deleteSectionConfirm: Remove "{name}" and every dish inside it?

hero.headline: Your menu, online in minutes.
hero.subhead: Guests scan a code to see it. Change a price in seconds, nothing to print.

testimonial.quote: Set up our whole menu in an afternoon. Now I change specials in ten seconds.
testimonial.name: Maria Alvarez

cta.title: Ready to put your menu online?
cta.subhead: Free to start. No card needed.

footer.langLine: Available in EN · PT · ES · FR · IT · DE

newRestaurant.title: New restaurant
newRestaurant.subtitle: Set it up and assign it to a tenant. It starts on the On Us plan.

manual.heading: Create manually
manual.hint: Name it and pick its languages. It starts with an empty menu.
manual.languageHint: This language loads first. Guests can switch if you add more later.

import.heading: Import from JSON
import.lead: Paste a JSON document, or photograph a menu and let an AI fill it in: copy the prompt, attach the photo in your AI tool, then paste the result here.
import.hint: Creates the restaurant and its full menu.

tenant.label: Tenant
tenant.newHint: Optional. Defaults to the restaurant name.
tenant.hint: The owner this restaurant belongs to.

plan.name: On Us
plan.note: Starts free. Upgrade it later from Payments.

errors.tenantRequired: Pick a tenant or name a new one.
errors.invalidInput: Check the form and try again.
errors.invalidJson: That isn't valid JSON. Check the syntax and try again.
errors.failed: Could not create the restaurant. Please try again.

slug.label: Slug
slug.hint: The public link. Defaults to the name; edit to customize.
slug.invalid: Use 2 to 40 lowercase letters, numbers or dashes.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.subtitle: {count} across all tenants.
restaurants.emptyNone: No restaurants on the platform yet.

detail.ownerUnavailable: Owner details are unavailable right now.
detail.qrManaged: Generate, download and print this restaurant’s QR codes on its QR page.

edit.friendlyNameHint: Shown in the sidebar and to guests. Staff override — recorded in the audit log.
edit.menusDesc: Add menus, sections, items and prices.

payments.title: Payments
payments.cashNote: Cash for now — Stripe card payments come later.
payments.recordFailed: Could not record the payment. Try again.
payments.promoHint: Optional campaign label — shown as a badge.

qrCodes.title: QR codes
qrCodes.crmSubtitle: Bind printed stickers to restaurants, spot open inventory, and keep the fulfilment queue moving from one mobile-first console.
qrCodes.crmQueue: {count, plural, one {# open code} other {# open codes}}
qrCodes.label: Label
qrCodes.bulkHint: Mint open stickers before sending them to print.
qrCodes.createCodesHint: Add one assigned sticker or mint a batch for future accounts.
qrCodes.createOneHint: Best for a named restaurant or replacement sticker.
qrCodes.filteredCount: {count, plural, one {# record shown} other {# records shown}}
qrCodes.noResults: No QR codes match this view.
qrCodes.generated: {count, plural, one {Generated # code} other {Generated # codes}} · see registry below
qrCodes.deleteConfirm: Delete code {code}? This cannot be undone.

audit.subscriptionExpired: Payment expired — dropped to On Us

existing.label: Transfer to

existing.full: That tenant's plan is full. Upgrade it to Kasa first.

new.passwordHint: At least 12 characters. They log in with this and skip onboarding.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Every restaurant and tenant across the platform.

House.announce: Now booking AI workshops for Q3
House.heroTitle: Most AI never ships. Ours does.
House.heroSubtitle: We’re a small studio that builds AI worth keeping. We consult, we run workshops, and we ship our own products.
House.heroMicro: We’ll even talk you out of AI you don’t need.
House.belief1: We’ll talk you out of AI you don’t need.
House.belief2: We ship in weeks, not slide decks.
House.belief3: You own everything. No lock-in, no black boxes.
House.belief4: Mobile-first and multilingual, or it isn’t done.
House.belief5: Small team, senior hands. You work with the people who build it.
House.servicesTitle: Three ways we help you ship.
House.service1Desc: We join your team to design and ship real software. The AI parts and the hard parts included.
House.service2Desc: Hands-on sessions that get your team building with LLMs and shipping to production.
House.service3Desc: We build and run our own products. What we learn goes straight back into client work.
House.step1Desc: We learn your domain and the outcome you need. No six-week discovery phase.
House.step2Desc: We ship working software in tight loops, with you in the room. Mobile-first and multilingual from day one.
House.step3Desc: You own it. A system you can run and grow, never a black box.
House.menuDesc: A drag-and-drop menu builder for restaurants. QR codes, publishing, analytics, and it works in every language. Free for one restaurant.
House.multilingualSubtitle: Every product we build is multilingual from the first commit. Your customers read it in their language; you manage it in yours.
House.ctaSubtitle: Tell us what you’re building, or book a workshop for your team. We read every message.
House.footerTagline: A software house that builds AI worth keeping.
